hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (subprocess.run(['uvx','ruff','format',f],capture_output=True),subprocess.run(['uvx','ruff','check','--fix',f],capture_output=True)) if f.endswith('.py') and 'backend' in f.replace(chr(92),'/') else None" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Formatting backend Python file with ruff...
